function.name: search_inventory
function.description: Searches the live store inventory for an auto part for a specific vehicle. Always use after gathering Year, Make, Model, Engine Size, and Transmission from the customer.

part_name.description: The specific part being searched for (e.g. starter, alternator, brake pads)

function.name: generate_payment_link
function.description: Generates a secure payment link and sends it via SMS to the customer.

part_name.description: The name of the part being ordered

price_dollars.description: The price of the part in USD (e.g. 215.99)

customer_phone.description: The 10-digit phone number of the customer

function.name: get_web_comparison_link
function.description: Generates a direct URL to the part on the retailer's website for the user to verify.

sku.description: The SKU or part number to look up
